name: careero-marketing
description: Public SEO/marketing site for Careero (careero.app). Zero-dependency static-site generator — emits fully pre-rendered HTML.

scripts.lint: node --check build.mjs && node --check src/pages.mjs && node --check src/render.mjs && node --check src/site.mjs && node --check src/facets.mjs && node --check test/facets.test.mjs && node --check tools/og-gen.mjs && node --check tools/validate-build.mjs && node --check assets/site.js
scripts.serve: node build.mjs && cd dist && python3 -m http.server 4321
